title: NATIONAL CENTER FOR APPROPRIATE DISPUTE RESOLUTION IN SPECIAL EDUCATION - 211info
text: DIRECTION SERVICE NATIONAL CENTER FOR APPROPRIATE DISPUTE RESOLUTION IN SPECIAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides meeting facilitation, and other collaborative processes to resolve disagreements between parents and schools regarding children's educational programs and support services. Facilitates a variety of technical assistance services including training, workshops, and presentations, data analysis, systems improvement, and resource development. 1144 Gateway Loop Suite 200 Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 359-4210 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 359-4210 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Mediation * Special Education Issues * Special Education Issues Organizational Consultation/Technical Assistance * Special Education Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - EDUCATION TEAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WRAPAROUND FACILITATION WITH PEER SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - PEER SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DIRECTION SERVICE
